name: Stunned
effect: Recovers on the pitch — turned face-up to [[prone|Prone]] at the end of the team's turn.

name: Knocked-out
effect: Carried off to the Reserves — recovers on a 4+ at the end of each drive.

name: Casualty
effect: Taken out of action — roll on the Casualty table.

name: Stunned
effect: Recovers on the pitch — turned face-up to [[prone|Prone]] at the end of the team's turn.

name: Knocked-out
effect: Carried off to the Reserves — recovers on a 4+ at the end of each drive.

name: Badly Hurt
effect: Badly Hurt — the mildest Casualty, suffered without a Casualty roll.

name: Casualty
effect: Taken out of action — roll on the Casualty table.
